# Detox - Web-Based Automata Intelligence

Detox is a web-based toxic content moderation system using automata theory (NFA for slang normalization and DFA for pattern matching). It detects toxic Indonesian words and phrases with linear O(n) time complexity.

## Key Features

- **Analyzer**: Single text input analysis with live transition path visualization (NFA/DFA).
- **Bulk Checker**: Upload TXT, PDF, or DOCX files for batch toxicity checks.
- **Kamus / Lexicon**: Customizable slang-to-formal normalization map and toxic word list.
- **Riwayat**: Local history log of text checks and automata path traces.

## Technology Stack

- **Frontend**: SvelteKit (SPA/runes mode) with Lucide Icons.
- **Backend**: FastAPI (Python 3.10+) serving the NFA/DFA processing engine.

## Authors & Institution

- Developed by Group Greenflag (Cut Sarah Alisa, M. Rizal Basri, Wesnita Ruth Angie)
- Institution: President University Pekanbaru
- Course: Formal Language and Automata (FLA)
- Lecturer: Shella Eldwina Fitri S.T., M.Eng
